title: Arc3 Method, Spel Class
syntax:
Sub Arc3 (MidPoint As Integer, EndPoint As Integer)

Sub Arc3 (MidPoint As SpelPoint, EndPoint As SpelPoint)

Sub Arc3 (MidPoint As String, EndPoint As String)
parameters:
Each syntax has two parameters that specify the mid point and end point of the arc.

MidPoint	Specifies
		 the mid point by using an integer, SpelPoint or string expression.

EndPoint	Specifies
		 the end point by using an integer, SpelPoint or string expression.
		 When using a string expression, you can include ROT, ECP, CP,
		 SYNC, Till, Find, a search expression for Till, and a parallel
		 processing statement.
description: Arc3 moves the arm to the specified point using circular interpolation in 3 dimensions.
see_also:
Go

Move

TGo

Find

Arc3 Example

VB
examples:
' Points specified using SpelPoint
Dim midPoint, endPoint as SpelPoint
midPoint = m_spel.GetPoint("P1")
endPoint = m_spel.GetPoint("P2")
m_spel.Arc3(midPoint, endPoint)

' Points specified using expressions
m_spel.Arc3("P1", "P2")
m_spel.Arc3("P1", "P2 CP")

' Using parallel processing
m_spel.Arc3("P1", "P2 !D50; On 1; D90; Off 1!")

// Using parallel processing
m_spel.Arc3("P1", "P2 !D50; On 1; D90; Off 1!");
